basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/MSc. in Communication Engg./ Electronics and Communications Engg /Electrical Engg. /Electronics Engg./. /Computer Science Engg/Information Theory/Physics/Electronics/Computer Science, NET/GATE Qualified (Desirable)
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/MSc. in Communication Engg./ Electronics and Communications Engg /Electrical Engg. /Electronics Engg./. /Computer Science Engg/Information Theory/Physics/Electronics/Computer Science. Desirable: NET/GATE Qualified Candidate

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani is July 6, 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech/MSc. degree in relevant fields like Communication Engineering, Electronics, Computer Science, or Physics. NET/GATE qualification is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. Prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the designated email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The duration of the contract will be as per the project requirements and institute policies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: BITS Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
